_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of NLP task taxonomy, including classification, named entity recognition, relation extraction, summarization, translation, and question answering, and the model architectures appropriate for each.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-010 (AI, cosine: 0.503), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.489).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.614). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [mechanisms, tasking] vs WIDAI-only terms [answering, appropriate, architectures, classification, entity, extraction] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.930, R=0.839). P exceeds R by 0.091 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of tasking mechanisms." and "Knowledge of NLP task taxonomy, including classification, named entity recogniti" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.519 < STS 0.614 (gap -0.095). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [mechanisms, tasking] and [answering, appropriate, architectures] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [mechanisms, tasking]. WIDAI-only: [answering, appropriate, architectures, classification, entity, extraction].
